channel.title: Epistemics on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Epistemics on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: Cascade Failure: When AI Models Start to Look Alike
item.description: We observe information cascades everywhere—financial bubbles, viral misinformation, echo chambers. But what happens when the cascade happens inside us? When AI models start training on AI-generated content, something strange emerges: we become victims of our own coherence.
